name: Ironclad
description: Ironclad is a contract lifecycle management (CLM) platform that automates the entire contract process from creation to signature to storage. Its API enables programmatic management of contract workflows, records, approvals, and metadata for legal operations teams.

capabilities.name: launch_workflow
capabilities.description: Create and launch a new contract workflow from a template, specifying attributes, approvers, and counterparty details.

capabilities.name: get_workflow
capabilities.description: Retrieve the current status, metadata, and details of an existing contract workflow.

capabilities.name: list_workflows
capabilities.description: List all workflows in your Ironclad instance with optional filtering by status, template, or date.

capabilities.name: update_workflow_approval
capabilities.description: Approve or reject a workflow that is pending approval, moving it to the next step in its lifecycle.

capabilities.name: list_records
capabilities.description: Retrieve all contract records from the repository with filtering by metadata, status, or date range.

capabilities.name: get_record
capabilities.description: Retrieve the full details of a specific contract record including its metadata, attachments, and lifecycle history.

capabilities.name: create_record
capabilities.description: Create a new contract record directly in the repository for contracts that were executed outside of Ironclad workflows.
